title: Floating Bottom Navigation with BlurView, Gradient Active Tab & Safe Area Support

requirements.summary: Convert bottom navigation to a floating container with fixed positioning, margin spacing, rounded corners, and safe area inset support
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom nav floats above page content with visible horizontal and bottom margins
Nav stays fixed at the bottom while scrolling page content
Page content does not slide behind the nav bar
Safe area insets are respected on notched iOS devices and Android devices with gesture navigation

file_operations.description: Redesign the bottom navigation container to use fixed positioning with horizontal margins (16-20px), bottom margin (12-16px), and borderRadius of 24px. Add safe area inset handling using CSS env() variables (safe-area-inset-bottom) to respect iOS notches and Android gesture areas. Update container styles to float above content without scrolling.

Update the layout to accommodate the floating bottom navigation by adding bottom padding to the main content area equal to the nav height plus margins. Ensure content does not overlap the floating nav bar and scrolling behavior remains smooth. Apply safe area padding adjustments to the content wrapper.

Update the patient layout to accommodate the floating bottom navigation by adding bottom padding to the main content area equal to the nav height plus margins. Ensure content does not overlap the floating nav bar and scrolling behavior remains smooth. Apply safe area padding adjustments to the content wrapper.

Add utility classes for the floating bottom navigation container including fixed positioning, margin spacing, border radius, and safe area inset support. Include CSS custom properties for consistent spacing values across layouts.

requirements.summary: Apply frosted-glass BlurView background with fallback, subtle border, and soft shadow to the floating navigation container
acceptanceCriteria: BlurView renders a visible frosted-glass blur behind the nav bar at intensity 60–80
If BlurView is unavailable the nav bar shows rgba(255,255,255,0.9) background
A subtle 1px semi-transparent white border is visible around the nav container
A soft drop shadow (opacity 0.08, radius 12, offset y:6) is visible below the nav bar

file_operations.description: Wrap the navigation content with a BlurView component from expo-blur (or react-native-blur if using React Native Web) with intensity 60-80 and tint 'light'. Add a fallback solid background of rgba(255,255,255,0.9) for environments where BlurView is not supported (use conditional rendering or error boundary). Apply border styles (borderWidth: 1, borderColor: rgba(255,255,255,0.3)) and shadow properties (shadowColor: #000, shadowOpacity: 0.08, shadowRadius: 12, shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 6 }, elevation: 10 for Android) to the container.

Add utility classes for the frosted-glass effect including border styles (1px rgba(255,255,255,0.3)), shadow properties (box-shadow with 0.08 opacity, 12px radius, 6px y-offset), and fallback background color (rgba(255,255,255,0.9)). Include CSS custom properties for consistent blur and shadow values.

requirements.summary: Style active tab with gradient pill background, white icon, scale animation, and smooth transitions between tabs
acceptanceCriteria: Active tab shows a visible gradient pill (#0D47A1 to #26C6DA) behind the icon/label
Active tab animates to scale 1.05–1.1 when selected
Switching tabs produces a smooth animated transition with no flicker or jump

file_operations.description: Add active tab styling with a gradient pill background using linear-gradient from #0D47A1 to #26C6DA. Apply white color to active tab icons and labels. Implement scale transform animation (1.05-1.1) on active state using CSS transitions or Framer Motion. Set inactive tab icons to color #94A3B8. Add smooth transition properties (transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out) for tab switching animations. Ensure pill background has appropriate padding and border radius to wrap the icon/label.

Add utility classes for the active tab gradient pill (linear-gradient(to right, #0D47A1, #26C6DA)), white icon color, inactive icon color (#94A3B8), and scale animation keyframes. Include transition properties for smooth tab switching with no flicker. Define CSS custom properties for gradient colors and animation timing.

requirements.summary: Preserve existing role-based navigation logic, routing integrity, and prevent layout shift during scroll
acceptanceCriteria: Each role (patient, phlebotomist, lab admin, super admin) still sees only their role-specific nav items
All existing routes navigate correctly when tapped
No layout shift or transparency glitch occurs while scrolling page content

file_operations.description: Verify that all existing roleNavConfig-driven navigation logic remains intact after applying the floating container styles. Ensure navigation items are filtered by role exactly as before. Test that route navigation handlers (Link/navigate calls) function correctly with the new layout. Add will-change: transform CSS property to prevent rendering glitches during scroll.

Ensure the content wrapper has proper z-index layering to prevent overlap with the floating nav. Add scroll event optimization (e.g., passive listeners) if needed. Verify that no layout shift occurs when content height changes or during scroll events. Test with different role configurations to confirm role-based visibility is preserved.

Ensure the content wrapper has proper z-index layering to prevent overlap with the floating nav. Add scroll event optimization if needed. Verify that no layout shift occurs when content height changes or during scroll events. Test that patient-specific nav items render correctly with the new floating design.
